summary.zh: 记忆编辑与更新体验大幅增强，聊天与设置界面也更稳更顺。
summary.en: Memory editing and update delivery are much stronger, with smoother chat and settings polish.

summary.zh: 可在设置里按天编辑 compiled memory，Facts 也进入正式写入链路。
summary.en: Edit compiled memory by day in Settings, with Facts promoted into the canonical write path.

sources.title: feat: add a four-section memory editor with per-day week entries
feat: promote editable facts memory to the canonical facts pipeline

summary.zh: 今日记忆改为增量编译，周记忆由滚动日摘要驱动，减少重复重算。
summary.en: Today memory compiles incrementally, and weekly memory rolls forward from daily digests instead of full recompiles.

sources.title: feat: make today memory compilation incremental with a summary watermark
feat: replace weekly memory recompilation with a rolling daily digest conveyor

summary.zh: About 页可查看双语更新摘要；应用优先从 AtomGit 检查更新，GitHub 作备用源。
summary.en: The About page shows bilingual update digests; the app prefers AtomGit for updates with GitHub as fallback.

sources.title: feat: add release digest and atomgit mirror flow
feat: prefer atomgit updater with github fallback

summary.zh: 流式回复时可选中文字，工具输出折叠不再跳滚动，多选时仍可用消息底部操作。
summary.en: Select text while streaming, keep scroll stable when collapsing tool output, and use footer actions during selection.

sources.title: fix: keep transcript text selectable while the assistant is streaming
fix: keep scroll position stable when tool output collapses
fix: allow message footer actions during selection

title.zh: 浏览器视图按会话隔离

summary.zh: 切换会话时不再共用同一个浏览器视图，避免上下文串线。
summary.en: Each session keeps its own browser viewer so switching chats no longer mixes context.

sources.title: fix: isolate browser viewer per session

summary.zh: 模型、权限与上下文指示器布局更干净，上下文圆环不再显示数字标签。
summary.en: Model, permission, and context indicators are cleaner, and the context ring hides its numeric label.

sources.title: fix: simplify input toolbar model, permission, and context indicators
fix: remove double border on agent model selector capsule

summary.zh: 发送第一条消息前会预创建 pending session，减少冷启动时的空窗。
summary.en: Pending sessions are pre-created before the first prompt, reducing cold-start gaps.

sources.title: fix: precreate pending sessions for first prompt

summary.zh: 记忆查看器限定在设置面板内，编辑与保存权限分类更准确。
summary.en: The memory viewer stays inside Settings, with clearer scope classification for saves.

sources.title: fix: constrain memory viewer to settings panel
fix: classify facts memory save under the settings.write scope

summary.zh: 聊天记录行保留完整的 agent 头像身份信息。
summary.en: Transcript rows preserve the full agent avatar identity.

sources.title: fix: preserve full agent avatar identity in transcript rows

summary.zh: 消息组件的 store 订阅下沉到行级，长对话滚动更顺。
summary.en: Per-row store subscriptions reduce overhead for smoother scrolling in long chats.

sources.title: perf: hoist per-row store subscriptions out of chat message components
fix: guard chat timeline navigator against resize-observer update loops
